## Summary

- 

## Verification

- [ ] `./scripts/check.sh`
- [ ] `swift test`
- [ ] `swift build`
- [ ] Manual app run, if UI or helper behavior changed

## Power And Helper Impact

- [ ] No change to power-management behavior
- [ ] Power-management changes are explicit and reversible
- [ ] Helper, XPC, `pmset`, signing, or LaunchDaemon changes are described

## Documentation

- [ ] README, troubleshooting, power model, release docs, and changelog are updated when relevant

## Screenshots Or Recordings

Attach screenshots or recordings for menu bar, settings, permission, or error-state UI changes.
